tasks.label: Kill dev servers on 8000 3000 3001
tasks.command: $ports = @(8000,3000,3001); $pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($pid in $pids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output ('Killed PIDs: ' + ($pids -join ', '))

tasks.label: Kill dev servers v2
tasks.command: $ports = @(8000,3000,3001); $pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($pid in $pids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output ('Killed PIDs: ' + ($pids -join ', '))

tasks.label: Force kill dev ports clean
tasks.command: $ports = @(8000,3000,3001); $processIds = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($processId in $processIds) { try { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output ('Killed PIDs: ' + ($processIds -join ', '))
